untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Descending Broadening' and 'Right-Angled Descending Broadening' with characteristic flat top and expanding volatility requires multi-bar pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. The specific pattern shape (flat top with expanding lower lows and higher highs) cannot be expressed with single-bar price/indicator comparisons. Entry condition 'Pattern completes with breakout from the formation' requires pattern completion detection.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex chart pattern requiring visual pattern recognition. Approximated with: SHORT entry when price closes lower with expanding ATR (volatility expansion). Exit condition '55% rebound' from ultimate low interpreted as price crossing above a 0.55 threshold, though the exact mechanism for detecting the ultimate low cannot be coded without pattern recognition. Source text indicates better performance in bear markets for short-term trades; target regimes adjusted to TRENDING_DOWN and HIGH_VOL accordingly.
